race.description: Grafton Toyota South Grafton Qlty Cup
race.comment: HOLLYWOOD HERO (7) classy gelding who indicated he was ready to show his best after an eye-catching second over 1500m at Rosehill with the 61kg. Drops sharply in weight from the awkward gate and has solid each-way prospects. MR CHAPLIN (10) imported gelding who scored a tough win first-up, then not that far away in a tight finish when third over 1500m at Rosehill. Can stalk the speed and take a ton of beating with McEvoy keeping the ride. KRONENBOURG (3) comes down from Brisbane after running some respectable races over the Queensland carnival. Has the speed to get across and can give a ton of cheek with Rawiller aboard. MIDNIGHT DYNAMITE (2) won the LR Civic Stakes two back, then was not that far away with a fast-finishing third over 1400m at Rosehill. Keep safe from the wide draw and can get the trip.
